vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-setup
vBRIEFInfo.description: Veil project identity — Minimal Vector Skirmish

narratives.Overview: Veil (Minimal Vector Skirmish) is a minimalist 2D top-down space combat arena built with Python and Pygame. Players pilot a vector-style ship against AI enemies, or watch fully autonomous AI-vs-AI battles. Target scope is a small, polished MVP prototype with high replayability via AI Arena mode.
narratives.TechStack: Desktop app using Python 3 and Pygame only. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux). Windowed, resizable, 60 FPS target. Recommended module layout: main.py (entry/game loop), ship.py, ai.py, particle.py, utils.py.
narratives.Strategy: Use interview for this project (Light path — single-session MVP).
narratives.Quality: Run task check before commits. Target >=85% coverage on testable logic modules. Omit display-bound pygame event-loop entry (main.py) from coverage measurement per headless GUI constraints. Store secrets in secrets/ if needed. Tunable constants at top of source files.
narratives.ProjectRules: Python 3 + Pygame only — no other external dependencies beyond a one-command pip install. Clean, commented, modular code. Monochrome vector aesthetic with subtle neon accents. MVP includes sound (pygame.mixer), local high-score persistence, wave power-ups, and alternate weapon types. Wave progression with late-wave obstacles. Deferred post-MVP: multiple arena sizes, mid-run hull customization.
narratives.Branching: Trunk-based workflow — direct commits to master allowed (per USER.md override).

modules.name: Game Entry
modules.purpose: Pygame initialization, main event loop, mode switching, and frame timing.

modules.name: Ship
modules.purpose: Ship entity — polygon hull, physics state, rendering, weapons cooldown.

modules.name: AI Controller
modules.purpose: Modular AI behaviors attachable to any ship — chase, evade, personalities.

modules.name: Particle System
modules.purpose: Reusable particles for engine trails, hit sparks, and explosions.

modules.name: Utilities
modules.purpose: Vector math, drawing helpers, and shared constants.

modules.name: Tests
modules.purpose: Unit tests for physics, AI logic, collision, and game state (headless-safe modules).
